She drives her blade downward in a two-handed grip, body twisted mid-lunge, hair whipping behind her as the steel plunges toward an unseen throat beneath her descending strike.
Lightning erupts from her outstretched palms, fingers splayed wide as arcs of white-blue electricity coil up her bare arms, illuminating her grimacing face in the moment before release.
Leaping between crumbling pillars, she draws her bowstring to full extension mid-flight, arrow nocked and aimed downward, cape billowing as gravity has not yet claimed her.
Astride her roaring beast she raises a glowing sword overhead, the creature's muscles bunched beneath her as it launches from a cliff edge into open air.
Ice crystallizes in a spinning vortex around her raised fist, frost crawling up her forearm as she punches forward, the frozen shards exploding outward in a devastating cone.
She cartwheels over an incoming strike, twin blades extended from her spinning form, the weapons tracing lethal arcs as her body rotates horizontally through the air.
Scales ripple across half her face and shoulder, one eye burning gold while the other remains human, claws erupting from fingertips as her mouth opens in a transforming roar.
She plants her foot on a shield and vaults upward, spear pulled back in throwing position, every muscle coiled as she reaches the apex before the javelin's release.
Both arms thrust skyward, ethereal chains of violet light pour from her palms toward the heavens, binding something vast and invisible as wind whips her war-torn garments.
Her blade catches an enemy's weapon mid-swing, body arched backward in the parry, free hand already conjuring crimson flame for the counter-strike an instant away.
She whirls in a low crouch, blade held reverse-grip as she completes a sweeping leg rotation, the sword's edge tracing a horizontal arc that will sever ankles in the follow-through.
Flame spirals up from the ground around her planted fist, her head thrown back as pillars of fire erupt in a circle, the inferno climbing toward the sky in roaring columns.
Mid-backflip off a crumbling ledge, she looses an arrow straight downward, bowstring still vibrating as her inverted body clears the shaft's deadly trajectory toward targets below.
Feathered wings burst halfway from her shoulder blades, bone and membrane tearing through leather armor as she launches skyward, feet leaving the ground in explosive ascent.
She slides beneath a sweeping blow on her knees, twin daggers raised above her head to catch the attack, sparks showering down across her upturned face.
Arcane sigils blaze in concentric rings around her extended arm, reality warping and folding as she tears open a rift, wind and light streaming from the dimensional breach.
Vaulting from her mount's saddle, she somersaults forward with axe raised, the beast charging onward beneath her airborne form as she descends toward her target.
Water coalesces into a spiraling drill around her thrust spear, the liquid weapon extending three times the blade's length as she lunges, droplets spraying from the vortex.
She pivots on one heel with sword extended, body horizontal to the ground in a spinning slash, her war-braid parallel to the earth as centrifugal force completes the rotation.
Green energy radiates from her chest as vines explode from the soil at her feet, thorned tendrils erupting upward as she conducts their growth with sweeping gestures.
She hurls a crackling orb of azure energy overhead with both hands, back arched as the sphere leaves her fingertips, trails of magic still connecting her palms to the ascending projectile.
Her spear thrusts forward in a full-body lunge, rear leg extended behind her, the weapon's tip inches from puncturing through an invisible enemy's guard as momentum carries her weight.
She twists mid-air in a corkscrew rotation, sword gripped in one hand as the blade carves a spiral path through empty space, her falling trajectory crossing between two unseen combatants.
Golden light pours from her open mouth and eyes as she screams skyward, arms spread wide, divine radiance cascading down her torso in waves of consecrated power.
Crouched atop her mount's neck as it rears, she swings a massive hammer downward with both hands, the weapon's arc aligned with the beast's descending hooves for a unified impact.
She catches an invisible blade between her pressed palms, body twisted sideways from the block's impact, blood trickling from her palms as they clamp the unseen edge.
Mid-sprint, she plants her spear into the ground and pole-vaults upward, legs tucked as she sails over an obstruction, weapon bending under her weight before the release.
Crimson runes ignite across her skin in branching patterns as she extends one clawed hand forward, demonic energy gathering in her palm while horns begin erupting from her temples.
She spins with a flail extended at arm's length, the spiked head blurred into a deadly circle around her rotating form, chain taut as physics drags the weapon through its orbital path.
Stone gauntlets materialize around her fists as she punches downward, earthen matter flowing up from the ground to encase her arms mid-strike, doubling their mass and destructive force.

She releases her bowstring at full draw, arrow already vanished from view, the weapon's limbs snapping forward as her fingers splay open, cheek still pressed to her knuckles in the instant after loosing.
Frost spreads across her collarbones and neck as she inhales deeply, head tilted back, frozen mist pouring from her parted lips in the moment before the blizzard breath erupts outward.

Her sword arcs horizontally in a decapitating sweep, both hands gripping the pommel as she rotates her hips, the blade's edge cutting through empty air where a neck occupied space milliseconds before.
She lands on one knee from a great height, fist driving into the stone floor, shockwaves radiating outward as cracks spiderweb beneath her impact, dust billowing up around her crouched form.
Electricity dances between her fingertips as she draws her hands apart, a crackling web of lightning stretching wider, her teeth clenched as the voltage arcs across her chest and abdomen.
Suspended horizontally mid-dive from her beast's back, she extends her spear like a lance, the creature's momentum carrying her airborne body toward an unseen target below.
She wrenches her blade upward in a rising cut, edge slicing from low guard to high, shoulders lifting as the steel travels vertically through its victim's path, gore trailing the ascending arc.
Shadow pours from her shadow-wreathed hands as she thrusts them forward, darkness coiling into tendrils that lance ahead of her lunging stride, her face half-obscured by the spreading umbral cloud.
Fur ripples down her spine and across her ribs while her fingers elongate into claws, mouth stretched wide in mid-transformation snarl, caught between human war cry and bestial howl.

She snaps a thrown dagger forward with her wrist, arm fully extended in the follow-through, the blade spinning away from her splayed fingers as her opposite hand already draws a replacement from her belt.
She sweeps her staff horizontal in a brutal arc, the weapon blurring through empty air as arcane symbols flare along its length, her torso rotating with the strike's full-body momentum.
Mid-dive from a battlement, she tucks into a roll with blade pressed flat against her forearm, body compact and spinning as she plummets toward unseen enemies below.
Torrents of wind spiral around her outstretched arms as she conducts the gale, hair streaming vertically upward, feet lifting from the ground as the cyclone responds to her command.
She drives her knee upward in a rising strike while simultaneously slashing downward with reversed blade, body compressed like a spring in the scissoring attack's brutal convergence.
Magma bubbles up between her planted fingers as she kneels, palm pressed flat to scorched earth, molten rock responding to her will and erupting in gouts around her anchored form.
Drawing twin throwing axes back behind her head, she leans into the imminent release, shoulders coiled and elbows high, weapons poised to launch in simultaneous deadly trajectories.
She backpedals with shield raised overhead, blocking debris from above as her sword arm cocks back for a blind counter-thrust, weight balanced for the unseen riposte.
Astride her mount mid-gallop, she twists backward in the saddle, bow drawn and aimed at pursuing threats, thighs clamped tight as the beast surges forward beneath her contorted frame.
Bone spurs pierce through her forearms and spine as she convulses mid-shift, vertebrae cracking audibly, her scream caught between human agony and inhuman rage as the transformation accelerates.
She hurls herself sideways through the air, body parallel to the ground, crossbow leveled and fired mid-leap, the bolt's recoil jerking her extended arms as momentum carries her through the shot.
